original_snippet_context: Discussion of the "Caixa de Conversão" project by David Campista and its relation to the "Convênio de Taubaté."

justification: While mentioning a predetermined rate and issuance of special notes, the emphasis on receiving gold and denying a "quebra do padrão monetário" suggests an inclination towards orthodoxy.
